name: Reliability will define the next decade of energy storage
headline: Reliability will define the next decade of energy storage
subheadline: How precision battery monitoring keeps grid-scale storage safe and bankable for years.

name: Uncovering the legacy of DSP technology: How a children's toy sparked the edge AI revolution
subheadline: Listen to the story of how TI cemented its legacy in signal processing with the Speak & Spell* and continues the innovation with today’s edge AI-enabled devices.
